title: Permutations and combinations
summary: 9709 S1 — nPr, nCr, counting problems, and links to binomial probability with GeoGebra.

simpleExplanation.title: Counting arrangements
simpleExplanation.summary: Permutations count ordered arrangements; combinations count selections. Factorial notation compactly expresses both.
steps: nPr = n!/(n−r)! — arrange r from n.
nCr = n!/((n−r)!r!) — choose r from n.

sections.content: **Permutations and combinations** (5.2) feed **probability** (5.3) and **binomial** work. Ask: **does order matter?** before choosing nPr vs nCr.
